text:
Market today: The mood is mixed. Geopolitical tensions and consumer warning signs are weighing on the broader market, which often hits growth-oriented tech and chip names. Specific warnings about chip stock premiums and leveraged ETFs are also relevant.

Your holdings: SOXL is down nearly 35% and SPAL, a new leveraged position, is down almost 38%. Both are well below their stops and are leveraged products that decay over time. Remember, trading on margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Closely monitor your leveraged positions (SOXL, SPAL) for further downside. Also, keep an eye on broader market sentiment, especially any escalation in geopolitical events or worsening consumer data.

Bottom line: Risk management is paramount right now, especially with your concentrated, leveraged, margin-fueled portfolio.
plays: SOXL is down ~35% and well below its default stop. Consider trimming or cutting this leveraged position to reduce immediate risk.
SPAL, another leveraged ETF, is down ~38% and also below its stop. Re-evaluate this new, volatile position to protect capital.
No new buys today - hold and watch. The overall market signals are mixed, and existing leveraged positions need attention.
